sections.title: Operational clarity for growing service teams
sections.intro: Choose a brand preset, select the sections you need, and adapt the content instead of rebuilding the site system.

items.label: minutes to choose a theme direction

items.title: Fullscreen entry sections
items.text: Split and centered hero variants share the same scene contract.

items.title: Results and credibility
items.text: Use proof cards and stat bands without rebuilding layouts.

items.title: Conversion-ready endings
items.text: Final CTA cards and contact panels keep the bottom of the funnel consistent.

items.question: Do I choose sections manually?
items.answer: Yes. The current model assumes section choice is manual and the starter accelerates everything after that decision.

items.question: Does the pipeline seed WordPress already?
items.answer: Not yet. It validates the active site config and page manifests so the next iteration can seed from a stable contract.

sections.title: Ready to spin up the next site?
sections.intro: Switch preset, adjust the manifests, and evolve the same reusable core.

items.title: Change the active brand
items.text: Set a different brand preset in site config and keep the same component contracts.

items.title: Validate the next build
items.text: Keep manifests and sections consistent before the site reaches WordPress.
